manual_commands: Stop Windows OpenClaw before enabling Ubuntu Telegram.
wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"; openclaw gateway run --port 18790'
otto.bat native-fallback  # rollback macro if WSL live fails
